title: Status
content:
- **Type:** Prospect
- **Stage:** Lead — warm (via Kevin Lynch intro)
- **Link:** Kevin Lynch (friend, marketing consultant, previously connected OO with Berlitz)
- **Website:** https://civilsafety.edu.au/
- **Date added:** 2026-03-18

title: Business Overview
content:
- **Type:** Registered Training Organisation (RTO 32381)
- **Location:** Queensland + Western Australia
- **Facilities:** 17 locations
- **Sectors:** Mining, civil, construction, agriculture, primary industries
- **Delivery:** Face-to-face, onsite, online, blended
- **Course catalogue:** 200+ courses across 27 categories

title: Key Stats
content:
- 95% satisfaction rate
- 80% employment outcomes
- Major clients: BMA, BHP, Rio Tinto
- Student portal: Axcelerate
- Payments: Afterpay available
- Funding options: CSQ, CTF, User Choice, ISEP, VETiS

title: Lead Model
content:
- No public pricing — enquiry/phone-led conversion
- Contact: 1300 248 457 / info@civilsafety.edu.au
- Enquiry form: secure.civilsafety.edu.au/course-enquiry/

title: Why We Didn't Move Forward Previously
content:
- Kevin originally tried to hook OO up for a local SEO contract
- They already had a solid team in place — didn't want to step on toes

title: Why We're Back
content:
- New angle: AI ranking, automations, Claude Code setup
- We now bring something their existing team can't — GEO/AEO, renewal automation, AI chatbot
- Kevin is still the link

title: Services to Pitch
content:
### SEO
- Local SEO x17 locations — almost certainly underdone
- Programmatic SEO: [course] + [city] — hundreds of rankable page combos
- Course page optimisation (200+ thin/templated pages)
- Schema markup: Course, LocalBusiness, FAQ
- E-E-A-T content: leverage RTO accreditation, BMA/BHP partnerships, 95% satisfaction


### AI Ranking (GEO/AEO)
- Test current visibility: ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews
- Entity building: get cited for "mining induction QLD", "confined spaces certification Brisbane" etc.
- FAQ content mapped to how AI answers safety training queries


### Automations
- **Renewal reminder system** — high-risk tickets expire (1–3 yrs) → automated 90/30/7 day reminders to past students (biggest ROI pitch)
- Enquiry form → CRM → instant personalised follow-up by course type
- Lead scoring: individual vs. corporate routing
- Post-course: certificate delivery + upsell sequence
- NPS/review request → Google review funnel
- B2B outreach sequences to construction/mining companies
- Corporate client monthly training completion reports
- Funding eligibility auto-checker (CSQ/CTF/User Choice)
- Trainer scheduling + location assignment automation


### Claude Code / AI Tools
- AI chatbot: "Which course do I need?" — reduces inbound call volume
- Course description generator: SEO-optimised copy at scale for 200+ courses
- Internal course catalogue search tool for staff
- Enrolment/location performance reporting dashboard

title: Hook for Pitch
content: > "Every worker you've ever trained is a future repeat customer — their tickets expire. You're sitting on a renewal goldmine you're not working."

title: Next Steps
content:
- [ ] Run full AI visibility audit (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews)
- [ ] Build lead audit doc for Kevin to share
- [ ] Confirm Kevin's current relationship with their decision-maker
- [ ] Identify best entry point: automations, SEO, or AI chatbot
